name: obsidian-toolkit
description: Obsidian vault workflow skills: turn the vault into the natural home for durable, human-facing documentation. feedback-sweep (Figma/FigJam review → classified, routed, answered register), obsidian-kanban (Bases task board: digest, create/move cards, triage inbox, promote backlog items), and obsidian-capture (promote durable decisions/specs/research/meeting-notes into the right vault folder). Vault-agnostic process; per-project config.
